myeongdong_cathedral.tourist_tip: Best visited in the evening for beautiful lighting. Free entry. Great photo spot at the main gate.

shinsegae_myeongdong.tourist_tip: Korea's oldest department store. Tax refund available on B1F. Free luggage storage near main entrance.

noon_square_myeongdong.tourist_tip: Trendy shopping mall popular with young Koreans. Great for K-fashion. Rooftop terrace on top floor.

cgv_myeongdong.tourist_tip: Main multiplex cinema in Myeongdong. Korean and international films. Great for a rainy day.

myeongdong_art_theater.tourist_tip: Iconic 1930s-era theater fully restored. Hosts Korean plays and musicals. Check schedule in advance.

n_seoul_tower.tourist_tip: 360° panoramic view of Seoul. Go at sunset for the best experience. Love lock fence on the observation deck.
n_seoul_tower.halal_info: Muslim prayer room available on-site. Halal-certified restaurant on 3F.

lotte_city_hotel_myeongdong.tourist_tip: Conveniently located near Myeongdong station. Good base for exploring the area.

lotte_dept_myeongdong.tourist_tip: Largest department store in Myeongdong. Tax refund counter on B1F. Wide food hall in basement.
